full_text:
Guo Chen
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Chenwas born in Dong. As Cao Cao considered retreating from Hanzhong, Chen urged him to keep fighting and Zhang Lu would soon surrender. Guo Chen was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
